channel.title: Volunteer on Hubert Huang | Personal Website
channel.description: Recent content in Volunteer on Hubert Huang | Personal Website

item.title: 2025 BA Winter Camp
item.description:
Introduction

Just like last summer, I have returned to the BA Camp (officially named the Business Administration Camp; hereafter referred to as “BA”) to serve as a volunteer.

item.title: Introduction to the BA Summer Camp
item.description:
Introduction to the BA Summer Camp

“The BA Summer Camp” stands for “the Business Administration Summer Camp”, and it is specifically organized for Taiwanese high school students to learn about business administration and related fields.
